# Implement Multi-Language Support for AI Agent

## Description
Add support for multiple languages in the AI agent interface and responses, making the family calendar accessible to diverse families and international users.

## Use Case
A bilingual family can interact with the AI agent in Spanish or English, and the AI will respond in the same language while maintaining all functionality.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Support for Spanish, French, German, and Chinese
- [ ] Language detection and switching
- [ ] Localized date and time formats
- [ ] Translated UI elements and responses
- [ ] Cultural calendar considerations
- [ ] Language preference settings
- [ ] Fallback to English for unsupported languages

## Technical Requirements
- [ ] Implement i18n framework (react-i18next)
- [ ] Add language detection and switching
- [ ] Translate AI agent responses
- [ ] Localize date/time formatting
- [ ] Update database to support multiple languages
- [ ] Add language preference to user settings

## Implementation Notes
- Use react-i18next for internationalization
- Store language preference in user profile
- Consider cultural differences in calendar usage
- Implement automatic language detection
